item.title: From an ICU RN in the U.S.
item.description: Warning: I am angry, and I am venting... Brian, I blame you (and every subhuman like you) every time my patient asks me how they're going to pay for their hospital stay. I blame you every time my patient blames me for "pushing [necessary] meds" on them. I blame you every time a loved one tells me that organ donation saved their family from ruin because the organization is now paying for their hospital bills. I blame you for everything modern medicine has become and I fucking hate you. I fucking hate you when I have to call the pharmacy to get a price point on Eliquis because it's notorious for being expensive even though its the best option for afib. I fucking hate you when my patients are so sick and just need to focus on progress, but they're terrified of PT, OT, etc because those consults are on the bill. I fucking HATE YOU when my patients' care is delayed because you need a prior authorization (some rando telling a fucking doctor or nurse what a patient needs because APPARENTLY the insurance company knows better.). Fuck you, fuck you, fuck you. I entered medicine because I want to help. I want to save lives. I want to educate and empower. You are my biggest barrier. So, no. I am not sad that people have decided to end your life subscription. I'm not religious, but if you are, I hope you meet Jesus, Buddha, Allah, or what have you, and they drop kick your teeth into your skull. Fuck you for having the power to make a difference in millions of lives, but CHOOSING to stuff your ass with dollars. I hope it sucked when you died. Fuck you.
item.dc:creator: ThePositiveRN

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
dang
not gonna rule it out
this also happens when i go to a professional
bastard
savage
soup
as is tradition
fellas feel free to choose also.. and anyone else! i like the things on the bottom left
but how big is a chunk???!
always the best segment
mmm hmm
we've all been there
i guess
he's all business
wait what
again
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The 489th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS!!! Edition #24
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
How I wanna die
Not sure why the sound didn't come through on this
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq -----FRESHLY UPDATED----- #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: And they wonder why their CEO's get shot...

item.title: Memes vol 435
item.description:
My toxic trait is believing I could land one of these things in an emergency
Seriously- and so many people on and I’ve encountered with from this site just view women as meat. Or if I post a pic of myself cosplaying “I miss when she had an OF” is that all you think about when you look at me? I’m this close to quitting the site and just creating a discord with my ladies
That feeling when kneeling surgery is tomorrow
It’s a long story
Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101
